name: Avocado Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter until light.
3. Gradually add sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
4. Sift dry ingredients together, reserving 1/4 cup.
5. Fold the reserved 1/4 cup of dry ingredients with dates, raisins, and nuts into the mixture.
6. Bake for 65 minutes.
7. Brush the tops of the loaves with corn syrup and press pecans on top.
8. Broil until the topping bubbles.
